Migrate this Angular 13 project to Angular 14.

Steps:
1. Update Angular dependencies from version 13 to 14
2. Update Angular CLI to version 14 (if required)
3. Update TypeScript to Angular 14 compatible version (~4.6)
4. Upgrade RxJS to version 7.x
5. Update zone.js to compatible version
6. Apply Angular 14 migration updates
7. Replace deprecated APIs (if any)
8. Fix compilation and runtime errors
9. Ensure the application builds and runs correctly

Constraints:
- Do NOT change folder structure
- Do NOT refactor unrelated code
- Keep changes minimal and safe
- Preserve existing functionality

Output:
- List of updated files
- Commands executed (ng update, npm install, etc.)
- Summary of changes
- Any manual fixes required
